name: New World Formation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>新</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>成</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Spell/Trap in your GY that mentions "Visas Starfrost"; Set it, and if you Set a Trap or Quick-Play Spell, it can be activated this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 3 Spells/Traps in your GY that mention "Visas Starfrost", except "New World Formation"; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "New World Formation" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 Spell/Trap in your GY that mentions "Visas Starfrost"; Set it, and if you Set a Trap or Quick-Play Spell, it can be activated this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 3 Spells/Traps in your GY that mention "Visas Starfrost", except "New World Formation"; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "New World Formation" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
Allows activation of Quick-Play Spell Cards the turn they were Set
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
